title: phyllanthus sikkimensis
intro: Phyllanthus sikkimensis, also known as Sikkim earth star, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus sikkimensis include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, and can also be dried and made into powders or capsules for easier consumption.
intro_study: According to "Evidence-based complementary and alternative medicine : eCAM", Phyllanthus sikkimensis may have potential benefits due to its isolation of over 510 compounds, including lignins, triterpenoids, flavonoids, and tannins, which have shown antiviral, antioxidant, antidiabetic, and anticancer activities.
